payload.answer: Conflict detected: Sara cannot be both your daughter and your niece in standard kinship logic. The existing memory (daughter) contradicts the new input (niece). This requires clarification.
payload.decision: Preserve both claims as conflicting; escalate for user clarification

entity_resolution.reason: Kinship relationship is logically contradictory (daughter vs. niece). Cannot be simultaneously true. Requires user clarification to determine which statement is accurate or if there are multiple people named Sara.

payload.intent: Resolve conflicting kinship claims about Sara's relationship to the user

details: User input required to establish ground truth

repair_options: Confirm Sara is your daughter and reject the niece claim
Confirm Sara is your niece and correct the daughter claim
Clarify if there are two different people named Sara
Provide additional context explaining the relationship discrepancy
